checks.description: An expected-report instance must identify the element type it conforms to.
checks.label: Has element type ID

checks.description: An expected-report instance must have a stable element instance identifier.
checks.label: Has instance ID

checks.description:
An expected-report instance must identify the fixture, bundle, element
instance, or test input it applies to.
checks.label: Has fixture reference

checks.description:
An expected-report instance must declare the expected verification,
conformance, or claim outcomes.
checks.label: Has expected outcomes

checks.description:
An expected-report instance should declare which report fields are required
for compatibility comparison and which fields may vary across implementations.
checks.label: Has comparison scope
